title: obione persistens
intro: Obione persistens, also known as Sea Purslane or Red Dock, is a succulent coastal plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and other essential minerals, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Obione persistens is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often consumed raw in salads or used as a cooking green.
